name: observation-timeline
title: Observation Timeline
description: Clinical observations in one chronological stream — vitals, results, notes, medications, encounters — each labelled with its source.

props.name: observations
props.description: `{ key, kind, title, time, source, author?, description?, trend?, flagged? }`.

props.name: kind
props.description: Drives the marker icon and colour.

props.name: trend
props.description: An inline value-plus-glyph for observations that have a history.

clinicalNotes: Interleaving record types is the point of a timeline, and it is also its risk: a device reading, a patient's own report, and a clinician's assessment carry very different evidential weight, and a stream that rendered them identically would quietly launder one into another — a patient-reported breathlessness must never end up looking like a measured respiratory rate. `source` is therefore required, not optional, and it is shown on every entry alongside the author where there is one. The inline trend follows the sparkline rule: the value is in text, the glyph is decorative.
